song.title: Presence
song.author: Newsboys
song.lyrics:
[V1] .G C Em D I lift up my voice to the King, the King of glory . G C Em D I hold out my hands to the One who is worthy . Am Dsus D I long for Your presence . Am D I long - Lord, I need Your touch.
[C] . G C Come O Lord and fill up my life . Em With the light of Your presence . D This is my heart’s desire . G C O Father, come and let Your Spirit abide . Em I long for Your presence . D This is my heart’s desire . C It’s my desire.
[V2] I long to be washed by the blood of Your mercy I long to be filled with the light of Your glory I long for Your presence I long for Your healing touch.
